rows.description: Computus Josephi Attwell Rectoris a secundo die Novembris
rows.notes: Description corrected from 'Hobwell' (gemini-flash) to 'Attwell' after visual inspection. Followed gemini-flash's correct segmentation into two distinct header rows, overriding gpt-5-mini's single combined header.
rows.section_header: Computus Josephi Attwell Rectoris a secundo die Novembris

rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash, as it correctly identifies this as a distinct header row and reads the text accurately. gpt-5-mini combined this with the previous row.
Consensus across both extractors for description and row type.

'Ladlane' and '&' (from the 'et' ligature) adopted from gpt-5-mini's more accurate reading of the middle part, 'Merton' for the end.
